root.description: Accessible, composable Audio UI components for React. {{count}} copy-ready blocks and demos covering players, faders, knobs, XY pads, and transport controls, built on top of shadcn/ui.
root.intro: Browse {{count}} audio/ui components for React and Tailwind CSS. Built on shadcn/ui and @audio-ui/react's headless primitives, every block is copy-ready and fully compatible with your shadcn/ui setup.
root.title: Audio UI Components

channel-strip.description: Channel strip patterns combining faders, knobs, and transport controls. {{count}} components.
